meaning: n.克鲁赛罗(巴西的货币单位)
examples: If there was an offer, it would be good for me and Cruzeiro.
If Cruzeiro offer the same amount, or we talk, I'd prefer to stay. But we haven't talked yet "."
Maicon made his debut to professional for Cruzeiro in 2001 and during his two seasons with the club they won the championship.
But he quickly became an idol with the Cruzeiro supporters, a symbol of skill and will to win.
Italy-bound after the World Cup, Sorin says that he would love to return to Cruzeiro one day, and he seems to mean it.
